# Anokolisa - Legacy Fantasy / High Forest

This folder contains the Legacy Fantasy / High Forest asset pack as a vendor asset for Ash Company.

Recommended use:

- first side-view animated hero placeholder
- first side-view enemy placeholder
- Aseprite learning/editing source
- forest/background experiments

When editing, copy the relevant `.aseprite` file into `assets/art/source/` and export the PNG/spritesheet into `assets/art/exported/`. Keep the vendor files unchanged.
